notes: Core pac-man mechanics are present but the maze rendering is poor (walls look like disconnected blue squares rather than proper corridors), ghost AI has issues with pathfinding through walls, and pac-man movement can feel jerky due to the grid-snapping approach, making the game functional but rough around the edges.

A solid and mostly complete Pac-Man clone with working pellets, ghosts, power mode, lives, and levels, but the maze/art are only approximate and some movement/AI behaviors are noticeably non-authentic.
